content.full_text:
MEMORANDUM

May 14, 1991

TO:    ADVICE FILE
        No. M-91-275

FROM: KEVIN S. BRAATEN-MOEN

SUBJECT: TELEPHONE ADVICE TO TOM BURNS RE: HOLDING AN EVENT IN A LOBBYIST'S HOME

-------------------------------------------------------------

When a lobbyist employer pays for an event to be held in a lobbyist's home, the lobbyist has "arranged" for a gift to those reportable individuals in attendance. Therefore, the amount benefiting each individual may not exceed $10. ($86201, Reg. 18624)
